# Fixture multi/a_ingestion.txt — ingestion pipeline.
# Shares with b_reporting.txt: WORKSTATION ETL_AGENT_01, CALENDAR WORKDAYS.
# Defines INGESTION.LOAD_FACTS that b_reporting's REFRESH_REPORTS depends on.

CPUNAME ETL_AGENT_01
  DESCRIPTION "Shared ETL agent"
  OS UNIX
  NODE etl01.bank.internal TCPADDR 31111
  FOR MAESTRO
    TYPE FTA
END

CALENDAR WORKDAYS "Business days"
  01/05/2026 01/06/2026 01/07/2026 01/08/2026 01/09/2026

RESOURCE ETL_AGENT_01#DB_CONN_POOL 8 "Database connection pool"

PROMPT INGESTION_SIGNOFF "Ingestion complete — proceed?"

SCHEDULE ETL_AGENT_01#INGESTION
  DESCRIPTION "Daily ingestion stream"
  ON RUNCYCLE WD_CYCLE CALENDAR WORKDAYS
  AT 0500
  PRIORITY 50
:
  EXTRACT_SOURCE
    SCRIPTNAME "/apps/etl/extract.sh"
    STREAMLOGON etlsvc
    DESCRIPTION "Pull source feeds"

  LOAD_FACTS
    SCRIPTNAME "/apps/etl/load_facts.sh"
    STREAMLOGON etlsvc
    FOLLOWS EXTRACT_SOURCE
    NEEDS 2 ETL_AGENT_01#DB_CONN_POOL
    PROMPT INGESTION_SIGNOFF
END
